AM.T: The LORD said to my Lord: “Sit at My right hand until I make Your enemies a footstool for Your feet.”

PM.T: For the wages of sin is death, but the gift of God is eternal life in Christ Jesus our Lord.

AM.T: I am the LORD; that is My name! I will not yield My glory to another or My praise to idols.

PM.T: Therefore each of you must put off falsehood and speak truthfully to his neighbor, for we are all members of one another.

AM.T: Incline Your ear to me; come quickly to my rescue. Be my rock of refuge, the stronghold of my deliverance.

PM.T: “Blessed is the King who comes in the name of the Lord!” “Peace in heaven and glory in the highest!”

AM.T: Blessed is the man who does not walk in the counsel of the wicked, or set foot on the path of sinners, or sit in the seat of mockers.

PM.T: and to love Him with all your heart and with all your understanding and with all your strength, and to love your neighbor as yourself. This is more important than all burnt offerings and sacrifices.”

AM.T: You are to fear the LORD your God and serve Him.

PM.T: For where your treasure is, there your heart will be also.

AM.T: The words of the LORD are flawless, like silver refined in a furnace, like gold purified sevenfold.

PM.T: Do to others as you would have them do to you.

AM.T: Be not wise in your own eyes; fear the LORD and turn away from evil.

PM.T: For what I received I passed on to you as of first importance: that Christ died for our sins according to the Scriptures, that He was buried, that He was raised on the third day according to the Scriptures,

AM.T: And I will sow her as My own in the land, and I will have compassion on ‘No Compassion.’ I will say to those called ‘Not My People,’ ‘You are My people,’ and they will say, ‘You are my God.’”

PM.T: But our citizenship is in heaven, and we eagerly await a Savior from there, the Lord Jesus Christ,

AM.T: On that day the LORD will become King over all the earth — the LORD alone, and His name alone.

PM.T: Bear with one another and forgive any complaint you may have against someone else. Forgive as the Lord forgave you.

AM.T: Let them praise the name of the LORD, for His name alone is exalted; His splendor is above the earth and the heavens.

PM.T: But the one who loves God is known by God.

AM.T: Therefore the Lord Himself will give you a sign: Behold, the virgin will be with child and give birth to a son, and will call Him Immanuel.

PM.T: But now in Christ Jesus you who once were far away have been brought near through the blood of Christ.

AM.T: A generous soul will prosper, and he who refreshes others will himself be refreshed.

PM.T: keep yourselves in the love of God as you await the mercy of our Lord Jesus Christ to bring you eternal life.

AM.T: But I will sing of Your strength and proclaim Your loving devotion in the morning. For You are my fortress, my refuge in times of trouble.

PM.T: Now the Lord is the Spirit, and where the Spirit of the Lord is, there is freedom.

AM.T: The LORD is my shepherd; I shall not want.

PM.T: And I will do whatever you ask in My name, so that the Father may be glorified in the Son.

AM.T: But let justice roll on like a river, and righteousness like an ever-flowing stream.

PM.T: Sell your possessions and give to the poor. Provide yourselves with purses that will not wear out, an inexhaustible treasure in heaven, where no thief approaches and no moth destroys.

AM.T: The LORD is my light and my salvation — whom shall I fear? The LORD is the stronghold of my life — whom shall I dread?

PM.T: And my God will supply all your needs according to His glorious riches in Christ Jesus.

AM.T: Let all the earth fear the LORD; let all the people of the world revere Him.

PM.T: In the same way, I tell you, there is joy in the presence of God’s angels over one sinner who repents.”

AM.T: This is what the LORD says: “Heaven is My throne, and earth is My footstool. What kind of house will you build for Me? Or where will My place of repose be?

PM.T: The next day John saw Jesus coming toward him and said, “Look, the Lamb of God, who takes away the sin of the world!

AM.T: I lift up my eyes to the hills. From where does my help come? My help comes from the LORD, the Maker of heaven and earth.

PM.T: Pray in the Spirit at all times, with every kind of prayer and petition. To this end, stay alert with all perseverance in your prayers for all the saints.

AM.T: The wise in heart are called discerning, and pleasant speech promotes instruction.

PM.T: For God has not appointed us to suffer wrath, but to obtain salvation through our Lord Jesus Christ.

AM.T: The heavens declare the glory of God; the skies proclaim the work of His hands.

PM.T: Share with the saints who are in need. Practice hospitality.

AM.T: For as high as the heavens are above the earth, so great is His loving devotion for those who fear Him.

PM.T: I have been crucified with Christ, and I no longer live, but Christ lives in me. The life I live in the body, I live by faith in the Son of God, who loved me and gave Himself up for me.

AM.T: Let the wicked man forsake his way and the unrighteous man his thoughts; let him return to the LORD, that He may have compassion, and to our God, for He will freely pardon.

PM.T: So I tell you: Ask, and it will be given to you; seek, and you will find; knock, and the door will be opened to you.

AM.T: I will exalt You, my God and King; I will bless Your name forever and ever. Every day I will bless You, and I will praise Your name forever and ever.

PM.T: Not only that, but we also rejoice in our sufferings, because we know that suffering produces perseverance; perseverance, character; and character, hope.

AM.T: It is well with the man who is generous and lends freely, whose affairs are guided by justice.

PM.T: Therefore do not be foolish, but understand what the Lord’s will is.

AM.T: Who is a God like You, who pardons iniquity and passes over the transgression of the remnant of His inheritance — who does not retain His anger forever, because He delights in loving devotion?

PM.T: For the message of the cross is foolishness to those who are perishing, but to us who are being saved it is the power of God.

AM.T: I will sing to the LORD, for He has been good to me.

PM.T: For all who are led by the Spirit of God are sons of God.

AM.T: How much better to acquire wisdom than gold! To gain understanding is more desirable than silver.

PM.T: For in Him all things were created, things in heaven and on earth, visible and invisible, whether thrones or dominions or rulers or authorities. All things were created through Him and for Him.

AM.T: Give thanks to the LORD, for He is good. His loving devotion endures forever.

PM.T: And a servant of the Lord must not be quarrelsome, but must be kind to everyone, able to teach, and forbearing.

AM.T: He makes my feet like those of a deer and stations me upon the heights.

PM.T: Be merciful, just as your Father is merciful.
